message:
fix(web): regenerate phage.db.gz from current database

The previous phage.db.gz was generated from an older version of the
database, causing hash mismatches when the app loads:

"Database hash mismatch (expected X, got Y)"

This commit regenerates phage.db.gz from the current phage.db to ensure
the compressed and uncompressed versions have matching content.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
